title: Museum of Russian Culture | Russian Center of SF
content: ###### Russian Center of San Francisco​. # Museum of Russian Culture. # Welcome to the Museum of Russian Culture and explore the history of how Russian heritage integrated into the mosaic of American society. Located in the heart of San Francisco, join us on a journey through time and culture and discover the narratives and artifacts that chronicle our Russian-American immigrant history. ## The museum is dedicated to collecting and safeguarding a diverse array of Russian historical materials, artifacts, art, books, newspapers, and magazines. ### Recognizing the significant impact of Americans of Russian descent, our museum strives to collect and safeguard materials that highlight their noteworthy contributions to American culture, technology, and society. ### The museum is open to researchers and enthusiasts alike, providing access to our extensive collection for those conducting research in Russian history or culture. ##### The museum is located on the third floor of the Russian Center in San Francisco.
